Epi. Stress Clusters Diffex.

M. Muzamil Khan

2024-09-10

PATH <- "/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/projects/oralcancer/4nqo/"

library(Seurat)
## Attaching SeuratObject
library(dplyr)
## 
## Attaching package: 'dplyr'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter, lag
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
library(ggplot2)
library(VennDiagram)
## Loading required package: grid
## Loading required package: futile.logger

Epithelial Compartment

Load object

e7386_epi <- readRDS(file = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/2023_01_09_e7386_epi.rds"))

Trt diffex in clusters

Clust 4

#clust 4
e7386_epi_clust4 <- subset(e7386_epi, seurat_clusters==4)
e7386_epi_clust4$seurat_clusters <- factor(e7386_epi_clust4$seurat_clusters)

Idents(e7386_epi_clust4) <- "treatment"

clust4_nqo_e7386_25 <- FindMarkers(e7386_epi_clust4, ident.1 = "4NQO control", ident.2 = "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg", assay = "RNA", test.use = "MAST")
clust4_nqo_e7386_50 <- FindMarkers(e7386_epi_clust4, ident.1 = "4NQO control", ident.2 = "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg", assay = "RNA", test.use = "MAST")

clust4_nqo_e7386_25$gene <-  rownames(clust4_nqo_e7386_25)
clust4_nqo_e7386_50$gene <-  rownames(clust4_nqo_e7386_50)

clust4_nqo_e7386_25$cond <- rep.int(times  = nrow(clust4_nqo_e7386_25), x = "4NQO control.vs.4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg")
clust4_nqo_e7386_50$cond <- rep.int(times  = nrow(clust4_nqo_e7386_50), x = "4NQO control.vs.4NQO + E7386; 50 mg/kg")

Clust 11

e7386_epi_clust11 <- subset(e7386_epi, seurat_clusters==11)
e7386_epi_clust11$seurat_clusters <- factor(e7386_epi_clust11$seurat_clusters)

Idents(e7386_epi_clust11) <- "treatment"

clust11_nqo_e7386_25 <- FindMarkers(e7386_epi_clust11, ident.1 = "4NQO control", ident.2 = "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg", assay = "RNA", test.use = "MAST")
clust11_nqo_e7386_50 <- FindMarkers(e7386_epi_clust11, ident.1 = "4NQO control", ident.2 = "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg", assay = "RNA", test.use = "MAST")

clust11_nqo_e7386_25$gene <-  rownames(clust11_nqo_e7386_25)
clust11_nqo_e7386_50$gene <-  rownames(clust11_nqo_e7386_50)

clust11_nqo_e7386_25$cond <- rep.int(times  = nrow(clust11_nqo_e7386_25), x = "4NQO control.vs.4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg")
clust11_nqo_e7386_50$cond <- rep.int(times  = nrow(clust11_nqo_e7386_50), x = "4NQO control.vs.4NQO + E7386; 50 mg/kg")

Save results

clust4_11_trt <- list(clust4_nqo_e7386_25=clust4_nqo_e7386_25,
     clust4_nqo_e7386_50=clust4_nqo_e7386_50,
     clust11_nqo_e7386_25=clust11_nqo_e7386_25,
     clust11_nqo_e7386_50=clust11_nqo_e7386_50)

saveRDS(clust4_11_trt, file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/2024_09_10_4nqo_e7386_clust411trt.rds"))
clust4_11_trt <- readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/2024_09_10_4nqo_e7386_clust411trt.rds"))

clust4_11_trt$clust4_nqo_e7386_25 <- clust4_11_trt$clust4_nqo_e7386_25 %>% mutate(across(c("p_val", "avg_log2FC", "p_val_adj"), round, 8))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `mutate()`.
## ℹ In argument: `across(c("p_val", "avg_log2FC", "p_val_adj"), round, 8)`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! The `...` argument of `across()` is deprecated as of dplyr 1.1.0.
## Supply arguments directly to `.fns` through an anonymous function instead.
## 
##   # Previously
##   across(a:b, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
## 
##   # Now
##   across(a:b, \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))
clust4_11_trt$clust4_nqo_e7386_50 <- clust4_11_trt$clust4_nqo_e7386_50 %>% mutate(across(c("p_val", "avg_log2FC", "p_val_adj"), round, 8))
clust4_11_trt$clust11_nqo_e7386_25 <- clust4_11_trt$clust11_nqo_e7386_25 %>% mutate(across(c("p_val", "avg_log2FC", "p_val_adj"), round, 8))
clust4_11_trt$clust11_nqo_e7386_50 <- clust4_11_trt$clust11_nqo_e7386_50 %>% mutate(across(c("p_val", "avg_log2FC", "p_val_adj"), round, 8))

DT::datatable(clust4_11_trt$clust4_nqo_e7386_25, caption  = "clust4_nqo_e7386_25")
DT::datatable(clust4_11_trt$clust4_nqo_e7386_50, caption  = "clust4_nqo_e7386_50")
DT::datatable(clust4_11_trt$clust11_nqo_e7386_25, caption  = "clust11_nqo_e7386_25")
DT::datatable(clust4_11_trt$clust11_nqo_e7386_50, caption  = "clust11_nqo_e7386_50")
logfc <- 0
fdr <- 0.05

clust4_nqo_e7386_25_up <- clust4_11_trt$clust4_nqo_e7386_25 %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC > logfc & p_val_adj <= fdr) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene) 

clust4_nqo_e7386_25_dn <- clust4_11_trt$clust4_nqo_e7386_25 %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC < -logfc & p_val_adj <= fdr) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene) 

clust4_nqo_e7386_50_up <- clust4_11_trt$clust4_nqo_e7386_50 %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC > logfc & p_val_adj <= fdr) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene) 

clust4_nqo_e7386_50_dn <- clust4_11_trt$clust4_nqo_e7386_50 %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC < -logfc & p_val_adj <= fdr) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene) 


clust11_nqo_e7386_25_up <- clust4_11_trt$clust11_nqo_e7386_25 %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC > logfc & p_val_adj <= fdr) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene) 

clust11_nqo_e7386_25_dn <- clust4_11_trt$clust11_nqo_e7386_25 %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC < -logfc & p_val_adj <= fdr) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene) 

clust11_nqo_e7386_50_up <- clust4_11_trt$clust11_nqo_e7386_50 %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC > logfc & p_val_adj <= fdr) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene) 

clust11_nqo_e7386_50_dn <- clust4_11_trt$clust11_nqo_e7386_50 %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC < -logfc & p_val_adj <= fdr) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene) 


diff_list <- list("clust4_4nqo.vs.e7386_25.up" = clust4_nqo_e7386_25_up$gene,
                  "clust4_4nqo.vs.e7386_25.dn" = clust4_nqo_e7386_25_dn$gene,
                  "clust4_4nqo.vs.e7386_50.up" = clust4_nqo_e7386_50_up$gene,
                  "clust4_4nqo.vs.e7386_50.dn" = clust4_nqo_e7386_50_dn$gene,
                  "clust11_4nqo.vs.e7386_25.up" = clust11_nqo_e7386_25_up$gene,
                  "clust11_4nqo.vs.e7386_25.dn" = clust11_nqo_e7386_25_dn$gene,
                  "clust11_4nqo.vs.e7386_50.up" = clust11_nqo_e7386_50_up$gene,
                  "clust11_4nqo.vs.e7386_50.dn" = clust11_nqo_e7386_50_dn$gene
                  )

Check for overlap with human cell lines

e7386_human <- readRDS("/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/projects/oralcancer/4nqo/data/e7386_hnsc_signatures.RDS")
icg001_human <- readRDS("/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/projects/oralcancer/4nqo/data/icg001_hnsc_signatures.RDS")

E7386

ggvenn::ggvenn(list(e7386_25=diff_list$clust4_4nqo.vs.e7386_25.dn, 
                    e7386_50=diff_list$clust4_4nqo.vs.e7386_50.dn,
                    e7386.hsc3.dn=e7386_human$e7386.hsc3.dn,
                    e7386.cal27.dn=e7386_human$e7386.cal27.dn), show_percentage = F, set_name_size = 3) + ggtitle(label = "Clust4")

ggvenn::ggvenn(list(e7386_25=diff_list$clust11_4nqo.vs.e7386_25.dn, 
                    e7386_50=diff_list$clust11_4nqo.vs.e7386_50.dn,
                    e7386.hsc3.dn=e7386_human$e7386.hsc3.dn,
                    e7386.cal27.dn=e7386_human$e7386.cal27.dn), show_percentage = F, set_name_size = 3) + ggtitle(label = "Clust11")

ggvenn::ggvenn(list(e7386_25=diff_list$clust4_4nqo.vs.e7386_25.dn, 
                    e7386_50=diff_list$clust4_4nqo.vs.e7386_50.dn,
                    e7386.comb.dn=e7386_human$e7386.comb.dn), show_percentage = F, set_name_size = 3) + ggtitle(label = "Clust4+Comb.dn")

ggvenn::ggvenn(list(e7386_25=diff_list$clust11_4nqo.vs.e7386_25.dn, 
                    e7386_50=diff_list$clust11_4nqo.vs.e7386_50.dn,
                    e7386.comb.dn=e7386_human$e7386.comb.dn), show_percentage = F, set_name_size = 3) + ggtitle(label = "Clust11+Comb.dn")

ICG001

ggvenn::ggvenn(list(e7386_25=diff_list$clust4_4nqo.vs.e7386_25.dn, 
                    e7386_50=diff_list$clust4_4nqo.vs.e7386_50.dn,
                    icg001.hsc3.dn=icg001_human$icg001.hsc3.dn,
                    icg001.cal27.dn=icg001_human$icg001.cal27.dn), show_percentage = F, set_name_size = 3) + ggtitle(label = "Clust4")

ggvenn::ggvenn(list(e7386_25=diff_list$clust11_4nqo.vs.e7386_25.dn, 
                    e7386_50=diff_list$clust11_4nqo.vs.e7386_50.dn,
                    icg001.hsc3.dn=icg001_human$icg001.hsc3.dn,
                    icg001.cal27.dn=icg001_human$icg001.cal27.dn), show_percentage = F, set_name_size = 3) + ggtitle(label = "Clust11")

ggvenn::ggvenn(list(e7386_25=diff_list$clust4_4nqo.vs.e7386_25.dn, 
                    e7386_50=diff_list$clust4_4nqo.vs.e7386_50.dn,
                    icg001.comb.dn=icg001_human$icg001.comb.dn), show_percentage = F, set_name_size = 3) + ggtitle(label = "Clust4+Comb.dn")

ggvenn::ggvenn(list(e7386_25=diff_list$clust11_4nqo.vs.e7386_25.dn, 
                    e7386_50=diff_list$clust11_4nqo.vs.e7386_50.dn,
                    icg001.comb.dn=icg001_human$icg001.comb.dn), show_percentage = F, set_name_size = 3) + ggtitle(label = "Clust4+Comb.dn")

convert_human_to_mouse <- function(gene_list) {
    output = c()
    mouse_human_genes = read.csv("https://www.informatics.jax.org/downloads/reports/HOM_MouseHumanSequence.rpt",sep="\t")

    for(gene in gene_list) {
          class_key = (mouse_human_genes %>% filter(Symbol == gene & Common.Organism.Name == "human"))[['DB.Class.Key']]
          if( !identical(class_key, integer(0)) ) {
            human_genes = (mouse_human_genes %>% filter(DB.Class.Key == class_key & Common.Organism.Name=="mouse, laboratory"))[,"Symbol"]
            for(human_gene in human_genes) {
                output = rbind(c(gene, human_gene), output)
            }
          }
     }
     return (output)
}

#e7386
e7386_hum_mouse_hsc3 <- list(convert_human_to_mouse(e7386_human$e7386.hsc3.dn))
#table(toupper(sigs$e7386.hsc3.dn_m[,2]) %in% diff_list_nqo$e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn)

e7386_hum_mouse_cal27 <- list(convert_human_to_mouse(e7386_human$e7386.cal27.dn))

e7386_hum_mouse_comb <- list(convert_human_to_mouse(e7386_human$e7386.comb.dn))
#table(toupper(sigs$e7386.hsc3.dn_m[,2]) %in% diff_list_nqo$e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn)

#icg001
icg001_hum_mouse_hsc3 <- list(convert_human_to_mouse(icg001_human$icg001.hsc3.dn))
icg001_hum_mouse_cal27 <- list(convert_human_to_mouse(icg001_human$icg001.cal27.dn))
icg001_hum_mouse_comb <- list(convert_human_to_mouse(icg001_human$icg001.comb.dn))

library(stringr)
ggvenn::ggvenn(list(e7386_25=str_to_title(diff_list$clust4_4nqo.vs.e7386_25.dn), 
                    e7386_50=str_to_title(diff_list$clust4_4nqo.vs.e7386_50.dn),
                    e7386.hsc3.dn=e7386_hum_mouse_hsc3[[1]][,2],
                    e7386.cal27.dn=e7386_hum_mouse_cal27[[1]][,2]), show_percentage = F, set_name_size = 3)

ggvenn::ggvenn(list(e7386_25=str_to_title(diff_list$clust11_4nqo.vs.e7386_25.dn), 
                    e7386_50=str_to_title(diff_list$clust11_4nqo.vs.e7386_50.dn),
                    e7386.hsc3.dn=e7386_hum_mouse_hsc3[[1]][,2],
                    e7386.cal27.dn=e7386_hum_mouse_hsc3[[1]][,2]), show_percentage = F, set_name_size = 3)

ggvenn::ggvenn(list(e7386_25=str_to_title(diff_list$clust4_4nqo.vs.e7386_25.dn), 
                    e7386_50=str_to_title(diff_list$clust4_4nqo.vs.e7386_50.dn),
                    e7386.comb.dn=e7386_hum_mouse_comb[[1]][,2],
                    icg001.comb.dn=e7386_hum_mouse_comb[[1]][,2]), show_percentage = F, set_name_size = 3)
